head_sha_semantics: research content commit immediately preceding this completion-record-only commit
limitations: Synthetic evidence does not establish production accuracy or performance.
No compliance certification, NIST endorsement, or legal determination is claimed.
This research PR does not implement or deploy production code.
V1 deliberately sends attachments, HTML, novel formats, and uncertain detections to manual review.
The recorded head SHA identifies the immutable research-content commit because a Git commit cannot contain its own SHA; the PR tip adds only this completion record.
